morningBrief.headline: Fresh Snow on the Way
morningBrief.body: 115 of 144 trails are open with 62 groomed. Partly Cloudy with a temperatures TBD. The forecast is flirting with us: light snow expected. Not a dump, but welcome.

morningBrief.headline: Snow Showers Ahead
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 8" over the last week. Snow showers in the forecast with a few inches expected. Conditions should improve.

morningBrief.headline: A Little Sugar on Top

morningBrief.headline: Variable Conditions
morningBrief.body: 1.6" of fresh snow settled in overnight. Not a powder day, but an upgrade. Mixed precipitation expected. Rain at base, snow up top. Dress in layers.
